title: selaginella anaclasta
intro: Selaginella anaclasta, also known as Spiny Pepperwort or Black Bead Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella anaclasta include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular remedy for colds, fever, and other infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
